violations.description: General employee cleanliness. — --Food employee did not wash hands as necessary. Food employee was observed putting on gloves without washing his hands. Hands should be washed before putting on gloves.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Multiple food items were found on the floor in the walk-in freezer during inspection. Food items should be stored at least 6 inches off of the floor.

Design and construction of floors, walls, and ceilings. — --Floors, walls, and/or ceiling were not constructed or designed to be smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable. Kitchen ceiling tiles are acoustic style and are not easily cleanable. Tiles should be replaced with ones that are smooth, nonabsorbent, and easily cleanable.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Flooring found dirty, especially under equipment. Floor should be cleaned and maintained clean. Wall behind flat top grill was found dirty. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.

Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not stored in a clean, dry location a minimum of 6 inches above the floor. Food items found on the floor of the walk-in cooler during inspection. Food items should be at least 6 inches off of the floor.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc.) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Kitchen and walk-in cooler flooring was found dirty during inspection. This should be cleaned and maintained clean.
